violations.claim: verifyAll computes vacuousCount using isVacuous which has false negative bug
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2 - State Mutation Analysis  
; LINE: 119
; verifyAll computes vacuousCount using isVacuous which has false negative bug
; Line 122: vacuousCount = blocks.filter(isVacuous).length
; If isVacuous returns false for actually vacuous formula, vacuousCount is wrong

(declare-const isVacuous_result Bool)
(declare-const actually_vacuous Bool)
; Formula has no variables - vacuous by definition
(assert (= actually_vacuous True))
; isVacuous bug returns false when declares.length=0 AND defines.length=0
(assert (= isVacuous_result False))
; verifyAll computes vacuousCount = 0 (incorrect)
; But should be 1
(assert (and (= actually_vacuous True) (= isVacuous_result False)))
(check-sat)

violations.claim: verifyAll computes trivialCount using isTrivialIdentity with regex bug
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1 - Precondition Propagation
; LINE: 119
; verifyAll computes trivialCount using isTrivialIdentity with regex bug
; Line 135: trivialCount = results.filter(r => r.trivial).length
; isTrivialIdentity bug: regex requires exact whitespace

(declare-const isTrivial_result Bool)
(declare-const actually_trivial Bool)
; SMT2 has (= x y) and (not (= x y)) but extra whitespace
(assert (= actually_trivial True))
; isTrivialIdentity regex fails due to whitespace → returns false
(assert (= isTrivial_result False))
; verifyAll computes trivialCount = 0 but should be 1
(assert (and (= actually_trivial True) (= isTrivial_result False)))
(check-sat)
